lemmas.statement: (n : Nat) (xs : List α) : drop n ([] : List α) = []
(n : Nat) (xs : List α) : take n ([] : List α) = []
(xs : List α) (ys : List β) : zip' [] ys = []
(xs : List α) (ys : List β) : zip' xs [] = []
(x : Nat) (y : Nat) (ys : List Nat) : x ≤ y → sorted (y :: ys) → sorted (x :: y :: ys)
lemmas.proof:
by
  intro hxy hsorted
  cases ys with
  | nil =>
    simp [sorted, hxy]
  | cons z zs =>
    simp [sorted] at hsorted ⊢
    exact And.intro hxy hsorted

lemmas.statement: (x y : Nat) : ¬ x ≤ y → y ≤ x
lemmas.proof:
by
  intro h
  exact Nat.le_of_lt (Nat.lt_of_not_le h)

lemmas.statement: (x z : Nat) (zs : List Nat) : x ≤ z → insort x (z :: zs) = x :: z :: zs
(x z : Nat) (zs : List Nat) : ¬ x ≤ z → insort x (z :: zs) = z :: insort x zs
(n : Nat) (xs : List Nat) : count n (insort n xs) = Nat.succ (count n xs)
(n m : Nat) (xs : List Nat) : n ≠ m → count n (insort m xs) = count n xs
lemmas.proof:
by
  intro hnm
  simpa [count, hnm] using (count_insort n m xs)

lemmas.statement: (n : Nat) (xs : List Nat) : count n (sort xs) = count n xs
lemmas.proof:
by
  induction xs with
  | nil =>
    simp [sort]
  | cons x xs ih =>
    simp only [sort, count_insort, count]
    rw [ih]

lemmas.statement: (n : Nat) (ys : List α) : drop n ([] ++ ys) = drop n [] ++ drop (n - length ([] : List α)) ys
(xs : List α) (ys : List α) : drop 0 (xs ++ ys) = xs ++ ys
(xs : List α) : length (reverse xs) = length xs
lemmas.proof:
by
  induction xs with
  | nil =>
    simp [reverse, length]
  | cons x xs ih =>
    simp [reverse, length, ih]

lemmas.statement: (xs : List α) (ys : List β) : length xs = length ys → length (reverse xs) = length (reverse ys)
lemmas.proof:
by
  intro h
  rw [length_reverse, length_reverse, h]

lemmas.statement:
(x : α) (y : β) (xs : List α) (ys : List β) :
  zip' (reverse (x :: xs)) (reverse (y :: ys)) = (zip' (reverse xs) (reverse ys)) ++ [(x, y)]

(xs : List α) (ys : List β) :
  length xs = length ys → zip' (reverse xs) (reverse ys) = reverse (zip' xs ys)
lemmas.proof:
by
  induction xs generalizing ys with
  | nil =>
    intro h
    cases ys with
    | nil =>
      simp [reverse, zip']
    | cons y ys =>
      simp only [length] at h
      omega
  | cons x xs ih =>
    intro h
    cases ys with
    | nil =>
      simp only [length] at h
      omega
    | cons y ys =>
      have h' : length xs = length ys := by
        simp only [length] at h
        omega
      have ih' : zip' (reverse xs) (reverse
